languages.text: "Сама их природа богохульна свершением ереси изобретения. Предполагалось, что генетор Фебрус радикально устранит источник неблагого кода, внедрившийся в нейроимпланты сервиторов. Вместо этого он изменил их бренную плоть таким образом, что она более не подвластна императивам Бога-Машины, транслируемым имплантами".

"Their very nature is blasphemous through committing the heresy of invention. Genetor Februs was supposed to completely eliminate the source of the malign code that had infiltrated the servitors' neural implants. Instead, he altered their mortal flesh in such a way that it is no longer subject to the Machine God's imperatives as transmitted by the implants."
languages.original_text: "Сама их природа богохульна свершением ереси изобретения. Предполагалось, что генетор Фебрус радикально устранит источник неблагого кода, внедрившийся в нейроимпланты сервиторов. Вместо этого он изменил их бренную плоть таким образом, что она более не подвластна императивам Бога-Машины, транслируемым имплантами".

traits.locale_text: "Their very nature is blasphemous through the commission of the heresy of invention. Genetor Februs was supposed to radically eliminate the source of the malign code that had infiltrated the servitors' neural implants. Instead, he altered their mortal flesh in such a way that it is no longer subject to the Machine God's imperatives as transmitted by the implants."

Instead, he altered their mortal flesh in such a way that it is no longer subject to the Machine God's imperatives as transmitted by the implants."

Instead, he altered their mortal flesh in such a way that it is no longer subject to the Machine God's imperatives as transmitted by the implants."

Instead, he altered their mortal flesh in such a way that it is no longer subject to the Machine God's imperatives as transmitted by the implants."

Genetor Februs was supposed to completely eliminate the source of the malign code that had infiltrated the servitors' neural implants. Instead, he altered their mortal flesh in such a way that it is no longer subject to the Machine God's imperatives as transmitted by the implants."

"Their very nature is blasphemous through committing the heresy of invention. Genetor Februs was supposed to completely eliminate the source of the malign code that had infiltrated the servitors' neural implants. Instead, he altered their mortal flesh in such a way that it is no longer subject to the Machine God's imperatives as transmitted by the implants."

languages.text: "Sie sind angesichts des Verbrechens der Erfindung an sich bereits blasphemisch. Genetor Februs sollte die Quelle des Schadcodes, der die Neuralimplantate der Servitoren befallen hatte, vollständig ausmerzen. Stattdessen hat er ihr sterbliches Fleisch auf eine Weise manipuliert, dass sie den von den Implantaten übertragenen Geboten des Maschinengottes nicht mehr gehorchen."
languages.original_text: "Their very nature is blasphemous through committing the heresy of invention. Genetor Februs was supposed to completely eliminate the source of the malign code that had infiltrated the servitors' neural implants. Instead, he altered their mortal flesh in such a way that it is no longer subject to the Machine God's imperatives as transmitted by the implants."

traits.locale_text: "Sie sind angesichts des Verbrechens der Erfindung an sich bereits blasphemisch. Genetor Februs sollte die Quelle des Schadcodes, der die Neuralimplantate der Servitoren befallen hatte, vollständig ausmerzen. Stattdessen hat er ihr sterbliches Fleisch auf eine Weise manipuliert, dass sie den von den Implantaten übertragenen Geboten des Maschinengottes nicht mehr gehorchen."

languages.text: « Leur nature même est blasphématoire puisqu'elle s'apparente à l'hérésie de l'invention. Au lieu d'éliminer complètement la source du code malveillant qui s'était infiltré dans les implants neuronaux des servitors, le genetor Februs a altéré leur chair mortelle de telle sorte qu'elle ne soit plus soumise aux impératifs du Dieu-Machine transmis par les implants. »
languages.original_text: "Their very nature is blasphemous through committing the heresy of invention. Genetor Februs was supposed to completely eliminate the source of the malign code that had infiltrated the servitors' neural implants. Instead, he altered their mortal flesh in such a way that it is no longer subject to the Machine God's imperatives as transmitted by the implants."

traits.locale_text: « Leur nature même est blasphématoire puisqu'elle s'apparente à l'hérésie de l'invention. Au lieu d'éliminer complètement la source du code malveillant qui s'était infiltré dans les implants neuronaux des servitors, le genetor Februs a altéré leur chair mortelle de telle sorte qu'elle ne soit plus soumise aux impératifs du Dieu-Machine transmis par les implants. »

languages.text: “其本质触犯了发明创造之异端，是为亵渎。费布鲁斯基因士本应彻底清除渗入机仆神经植入物的恶意代码，可他却改变了机仆的血肉凡躯，使其不再受植入物传递的万机之神指令约束。”
languages.original_text: "Their very nature is blasphemous through committing the heresy of invention. Genetor Februs was supposed to completely eliminate the source of the malign code that had infiltrated the servitors' neural implants. Instead, he altered their mortal flesh in such a way that it is no longer subject to the Machine God's imperatives as transmitted by the implants."

traits.locale_text: “其本质触犯了发明创造之异端，是为亵渎。费布鲁斯基因士本应彻底清除渗入机仆神经植入物的恶意代码，可他却改变了机仆的血肉凡躯，使其不再受植入物传递的万机之神指令约束。”

languages.text: «Su propia naturaleza es blasfema, ya que comete la herejía de la invención. El genetor Februs tenía como labor erradicar el origen del código malicioso que se había infiltrado en los implantes neurales de los servidores, y en vez de eso ha alterado su carne mortal de forma que ya no está sujeta a los imperativos del Dios Máquina que transmiten los implantes».
languages.original_text: "Their very nature is blasphemous through committing the heresy of invention. Genetor Februs was supposed to completely eliminate the source of the malign code that had infiltrated the servitors' neural implants. Instead, he altered their mortal flesh in such a way that it is no longer subject to the Machine God's imperatives as transmitted by the implants."

traits.locale_text: «Su propia naturaleza es blasfema, ya que comete la herejía de la invención. El genetor Februs tenía como labor erradicar el origen del código malicioso que se había infiltrado en los implantes neurales de los servidores, y en vez de eso ha alterado su carne mortal de forma que ya no está sujeta a los imperativos del Dios Máquina que transmiten los implantes».

languages.text: "発明 "という異端を犯すことで、彼らの本質を冒涜している。ジェネター・フェブラスは、サーヴィターの神経インプラントに侵入した悪意のあるコードの発生源を完全に除去するはずだった。代わりに、インプラントによって伝達される機械神の命令に従わなくなるように、彼らの肉体を改造したのだ。"
languages.original_text: "Their very nature is blasphemous through committing the heresy of invention. Genetor Februs was supposed to completely eliminate the source of the malign code that had infiltrated the servitors' neural implants. Instead, he altered their mortal flesh in such a way that it is no longer subject to the Machine God's imperatives as transmitted by the implants."

languages.text: "Doğaları gereği icat kâfirliği, bir nevi küfür içeriyorlar. Genetör Februs'un, hizmetörlerin sinirsel implantlarına sızan kötü huylu kodun kaynağını tamamen ortadan kaldırması gerekiyordu. Bunun yerine ölümlü bedenlerini, artık implantlar aracılığıyla iletilen Makine Tanrı'nın emirlerine tabi olmayacak şekilde değiştirdi."
languages.original_text: "Their very nature is blasphemous through committing the heresy of invention. Genetor Februs was supposed to completely eliminate the source of the malign code that had infiltrated the servitors' neural implants. Instead, he altered their mortal flesh in such a way that it is no longer subject to the Machine God's imperatives as transmitted by the implants."

traits.locale_text: "Doğaları gereği icat kâfirliği, bir nevi küfür içeriyorlar. Genetör Februs'un, hizmetörlerin sinirsel implantlarına sızan kötü huylu kodun kaynağını tamamen ortadan kaldırması gerekiyordu. Bunun yerine ölümlü bedenlerini, artık implantlar aracılığıyla iletilen Makine Tanrı'nın emirlerine tabi olmayacak şekilde değiştirdi."
